subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Qahir
subcodes.first_line: This is the Book from the Primal Point unto him who hath believed in God and His verses, and hath entered the sacred precincts of the Spirit, the dwelling-place of Him Who [3.5s]... ...I am not apprehensive for My own self. My fears are for Him Who will be sent down unto you after Me
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدن نقطه الاولی الی الذی آمن بالله و آیاته و دخل بقعه الروح مقر الذی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God
